## TRM1.2. Terminal capacity incentive scheme

In the first year of RP4, with an ATFM arrival delay of 0.56 min/arr, Czech Republic **did not achieve the national target** of 0.40 min/arr. The KPI is within the malus sliding range for the incentive scheme, resulting in an applicable penalty. As such, the NSA computes a penalty of -CZK 2,396,036.00.
